name: RadioWave
short_description: RadioWave is a realistic indie horror first person game set in the 2000s featuring killer robotics, an enticing three-part story in Campaign Mode, murderous fun in Custom Mode and a fast-paced Multiplayer Mode. Can you survive the RadioWave?
detailed_description:
Welcome to RadioWorld, a brand new robotics attraction aimed for families and people of all ages. Step into a unique world and experience the showcase of brand new, highly trained and powered AI robotics with bright and wonderful colours to entice your eye and advanced robot movement! What are you waiting for? Come to RadioWorld!

RadioWave is a semi-realistic indie horror first person game set in the 2000s featuring killer robotics, an enticing three-part story in Campaign Mode, murderous fun in Multiplayer Mode, and challenges to await in Custom Mode. Can you survive the RadioWave?

The ULTIMATE Mascot Horror Game!

RadioWave is the definitive game for mascot horror fans featuring:

  • Semi-realistic environments and beautiful lighting

  • Fun Maze Action that utilizes your stealth skills to sneak past robots.

  • Use items like the radio to find the location of where RadioWave and his friends are!

  • Play with friends in Multiplayer Mode!

Campaign Mode

Play as Detective Robbie, as you've been assigned to investigate and find out what happened at RadioWorld involving the robots going awry and murdering patrons, controlled by an evil and murderous hacker who once worked at the company seeking out revenge. Escape evil forces, use strategy to avoid RadioWave and his friends and arrest the hacker while uncovering the mystery. But be careful: don't trust ANYONE. Will you make it out alive?

Custom Mode

Want some more enticing action? Enter Custom Mode, a free sandbox mode featuring maps from the Campaign aswell as exclusive mazes for that mode. Choose which robots you want to activate, how aggressive they are and escape the map! Earn more points the more difficult the map is, and get a new highscore or speedrun! Use points and see how you rack up against your friends!

Multiplayer Mode

Salvage scrap in RadioWorld and extract as a Scavenger with others, or kill all the scavengers as a robot of your choice. Communicate with your friends with proximity voice chat! Fun and fast-paced, evade the robots and chase players in large mazes! An active internet connection is required to use this mode.
